top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Bond markets and the Senate rebuke Trump as Iran war worries linger
top_signals.summary: Trump faces resistance at home even as inflation expectations rise and affordability looms large ahead of the midterms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. Treasurys are now firmly in the 'danger zone,' strategists say
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasurys are in a "danger zone" as surging long-term yields raise fears that sticky inflation could begin spilling over into equities, strategists said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
